title: Modules, Packaging & Professional Tooling
source_outline: Modules and imports: import, from ... import, as; namespacing
The Python Standard Library: random, math, datetime
Package management with pip: installing and using packages
Virtual environments (venv): why isolation matters (concept + offline practice)
Poetry: poetry new to initialise a project (concept)
Pytest: writing and running a first test (concept)

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
